name: Five-Star Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: COUNTRY WOMAN MAGAZINE - JULY/AUGUST 19
1. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla until well mixed.
2. Add butter and shortening to the mixture.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the egg mixture and mix well.
5. If desired, add chopped nuts.
6. Line a 13" x 9" x 2-inch baking pan with foil and grease it.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
10. Turn brownies onto a cookie sheet, remove foil.
11. Place a wire rack over the brownies and turn them out to cool completely.
12. Cut with a star-shaped cutter or into bars.
Yield: about 3 dozen
